Pantheon.trading_pattern: Pantheon has early dominance. Play very defensive and focus on farming.
Pantheon.ability_to_dodge: Pantheon Q (Spear) — dodge by stepping behind minions.
Pantheon.early_game: Play extremely carefully. Pantheon will destroy you early. Farm with Q.
Pantheon.mid_game: Use R to escape ganks. Scale with team.
Pantheon.late_game: You outscale. Survive to reach your power spike.
Pantheon.win_condition: Survive early without falling behind. Outscale in late game.
Pantheon.scaling: Kassadin significantly outscales — Pantheon early, Kass dominates late
Pantheon.positioning: Stay at maximum distance. Farm safely with Q.

Brand.trading_pattern: Brand has stronger early poke. Respect his Q damage and farm safely.
Brand.ability_to_dodge: Brand Q (Sear) — dodge by stepping behind minions or moving back.
Brand.early_game: Play defensively. Brand has superior early poke.
Brand.mid_game: Use R defensively to escape. Scale with team.
Brand.win_condition: Survive early without falling behind. Outscale in late teamfights.
Brand.scaling: Kassadin outscales — his late game burst is superior
Brand.positioning: Keep distance and farm with Q. Avoid his poke zones.

Vel'Koz.trading_pattern: Vel'Koz outranges you significantly. Play defensive and farm with Q.
Vel'Koz.ability_to_dodge: Vel'Koz E (Tractor Beam) — dodge sideways or retreat.
Vel'Koz.early_game: Play very defensively. His range advantage is overwhelming.
Vel'Koz.mid_game: Use R to close distance when he's vulnerable. Scale with team.
Vel'Koz.late_game: You outscale. Survive early to reach your win condition.
Vel'Koz.win_condition: Survive early and reach your scaling point. Use R to engage late game.
Vel'Koz.scaling: Kassadin slightly outscales — his burst negates his poke advantage
Vel'Koz.positioning: Stay at range with Q. Use minions for cover.

Swain.trading_pattern: Swain has early tankiness and CC. Play defensive and farm safely.
Swain.ability_to_dodge: Swain E (Nevermove) — dodge by moving perpendicular to his aim.
Swain.early_game: Play defensively. Swain has strong early poke and tankiness.
Swain.mid_game: Use R to escape his engage. Scale with team.
Swain.late_game: You outscale. Survive to reach your power spike.
Swain.win_condition: Survive early and scale. Outscale in late game.
Swain.scaling: Kassadin outscales — his burst negates Swain's tankiness
Swain.positioning: Keep distance with Q. Avoid his E range.

Akali.trading_pattern: Akali is melee-burst. Respect her all-in and farm with Q from range.
Akali.ability_to_dodge: Akali E (Shuriken Flip) — dodge by stepping back.
Akali.early_game: Play defensively. Akali has strong early all-in potential.
Akali.mid_game: Use R to escape or engage. Both scale.
Akali.win_condition: Survive early, use R defensively. Outscale in late game.
Akali.scaling: Kassadin outscales — his late game burst is oppressive
Akali.positioning: Keep distance with Q. Use R to escape when she engages.

Galio.trading_pattern: Galio has early poke and engage. Trade when his abilities are down.
Galio.ability_to_dodge: Galio W (Shield) — respect his tankiness and trade from range.
Galio.early_game: Play defensively. Galio has decent early trading.
Galio.mid_game: Use R to escape his engage. Scale with team.
Galio.win_condition: Survive early, use R defensively. Outscale in late game.
Galio.scaling: Kassadin outscales — his burst negates Galio's tankiness
Galio.positioning: Keep distance with Q. Use R to escape his engage.

Taliyah.trading_pattern: Taliyah has strong waveclear. Farm when her abilities are down.
Taliyah.ability_to_dodge: Taliyah Q (Threaded Volley) — dodge by moving perpendicular.
Taliyah.early_game: Play defensively. Taliyah's waveclear is superior.
Taliyah.mid_game: Use R defensively. Both have roam potential.
Taliyah.win_condition: Survive early, use R to scale. Outscale in late game.
Taliyah.scaling: Kassadin slightly outscales — his burst is superior late
Taliyah.positioning: Keep distance with Q. Avoid standing in Q volley lines.

Mel.trading_pattern: Mel is weak early. Farm with Q and scale freely into your power spikes.
Mel.ability_to_dodge: Mel E (Reflect) — your Q doesn't reflect, so spam it.
Mel.early_game: Farm freely. Mel is weak and you scale better.
Mel.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let her scale.
Mel.late_game: You outscale significantly. Finish before she becomes relevant.
Mel.win_condition: Farm freely and scale. Close out the game with your power spike.
Mel.scaling: Kassadin outscales — your burst is oppressive

Azir.trading_pattern: Azir is weak early. Farm with Q and scale freely.
Azir.ability_to_dodge: Azir soldiers have limited early range; respect them but abuse him.
Azir.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let him free-farm.
Azir.win_condition: Farm freely, scale with R. Burst him down in fights.
Azir.scaling: Kassadin outscales — your burst negates his teamfight
Azir.positioning: Farm with Q. Close distance with R when needed.

Ekko.trading_pattern: Ekko has early mobility. Trade when his abilities are down.
Ekko.ability_to_dodge: Ekko W (Parallel Convergence) — dodge the stun zone.
Ekko.early_game: Play defensively. Ekko has decent early poke.
Ekko.win_condition: Survive early, use R defensively. Outscale in late game.
Ekko.scaling: Kassadin outscales — your burst is superior late
Ekko.positioning: Keep distance with Q. Use R to escape his engage.

Diana.trading_pattern: Diana is melee-burst. Play defensive and farm with Q.
Diana.ability_to_dodge: Diana Q (Crescent Strike) — dodge by stepping back or to the side.
Diana.early_game: Play defensively. Diana has strong all-in early.
Diana.mid_game: Use R defensively. Scale with team.
Diana.win_condition: Survive early, use R defensively. Outscale in late game.
Diana.scaling: Kassadin outscales — your burst negates her tankiness
Diana.positioning: Keep distance with Q. Use R to escape her engage.

LeBlanc.trading_pattern: LeBlanc has burst and deception. Play defensive and farm safely.
LeBlanc.ability_to_dodge: LeBlanc E (Ethereal Chains) — dodge by moving away.
LeBlanc.early_game: Play very defensively. LeBlanc has superior all-in damage.
LeBlanc.mid_game: Use R to escape her combo. Scale with team.
LeBlanc.late_game: You outscale. Survive to reach your power spike.
LeBlanc.win_condition: Survive early, use R defensively. Outscale in late game.
LeBlanc.scaling: Kassadin outscales — your burst is superior late
LeBlanc.positioning: Keep distance with Q. Use R to escape her combo.

Xerath.trading_pattern: Xerath outranges you significantly. Play defensive and farm with Q.
Xerath.ability_to_dodge: Xerath Q (Runic Barrage) — dodge by moving perpendicular.
Xerath.early_game: Play very defensively. His range advantage is overwhelming.
Xerath.mid_game: Use R to close distance when vulnerable. Scale with team.
Xerath.late_game: You outscale with burst. Survive early.
Xerath.win_condition: Survive early and reach scaling. Use R to engage late game.
Xerath.scaling: Kassadin outscales — your burst negates his poke
Xerath.positioning: Stay at range with Q. Use minions for cover.

Malzahar.trading_pattern: Malzahar has sustained damage and CC. Play very defensive.
Malzahar.ability_to_dodge: Malzahar E (Void Swarm) — respect his passive shield.
Malzahar.early_game: Play extremely defensively. Malzahar's sustained damage is strong.
Malzahar.mid_game: Use R to escape his ult. Scale with team.
Malzahar.late_game: You outscale. Survive to reach your power spike.
Malzahar.win_condition: Survive early, use R defensively. Outscale in late game.
Malzahar.scaling: Kassadin outscales — your burst negates his sustained damage
Malzahar.positioning: Keep distance with Q. Use R to escape his ult.

Ryze.trading_pattern: Ryze has early poke. Trade when his abilities are down.
Ryze.ability_to_dodge: Ryze Q (Overload) — dodge by stepping back or to the side.
Ryze.early_game: Play defensively. Ryze has decent early trading.
Ryze.win_condition: Survive early, use R defensively. Outscale in late game.
Ryze.scaling: Kassadin slightly outscales — your burst is superior
Ryze.positioning: Keep distance with Q. Use R to escape or engage.

Syndra.trading_pattern: Syndra has poke and CC. Trade when her abilities are down.
Syndra.ability_to_dodge: Syndra E (Scatter the Weak) — dodge by moving away from orbs.
Syndra.early_game: Play defensively. Syndra has strong early poke.
Syndra.mid_game: Use R defensively. Scale with team.
Syndra.win_condition: Survive early, use R defensively. Outscale in late game.
Syndra.scaling: Kassadin outscales — your burst is superior
Syndra.positioning: Keep distance with Q. Use R to escape her CC.

Orianna.trading_pattern: Orianna has poke and teamfight. Trade when her ball is far.
Orianna.ability_to_dodge: Orianna Q (Command: Attack) — dodge by stepping back.
Orianna.early_game: Play defensively. Orianna has decent early trading.
Orianna.late_game: You outscale with burst.
Orianna.win_condition: Survive early, use R defensively. Outscale in late game.
Orianna.scaling: Kassadin outscales — your burst negates her teamfight
Orianna.positioning: Keep distance with Q. Use R to escape her engage.

Cassiopeia.trading_pattern: Cassiopeia has sustained poke. Trade when her abilities are down.
Cassiopeia.early_game: Play defensively. Cassio has decent early poke.
Cassiopeia.mid_game: Use R defensively. Scale with team.
Cassiopeia.late_game: You outscale with burst.
Cassiopeia.win_condition: Survive early, use R defensively. Outscale in late game.
Cassiopeia.scaling: Kassadin outscales — your burst is superior
Cassiopeia.positioning: Keep distance with Q. Avoid her poison zones.

Anivia.trading_pattern: Anivia has poke and CC. Trade when her abilities are down.
Anivia.ability_to_dodge: Anivia Q (Flash Frost) — dodge by stepping back or to the side.
Anivia.early_game: Play defensively. Anivia has decent early trading.
Anivia.win_condition: Survive early, use R defensively. Outscale in late game.
Anivia.scaling: Kassadin slightly outscales — your burst is superior
Anivia.positioning: Keep distance with Q. Avoid her wall.

Darius.trading_pattern: He kills you freely pre-6. His bleed prevents your HP sustain. Only trade at level 2 with max poke, then retreat. Survive until level 6.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: Darius E (Apprehend) — never walk into pull range. His pull into full bleed stack combo kills you at levels 1-5.

power_spikes.you: Level 6 (ult self-use for survival), Level 11 (ranged form)

Darius.early_game: Farm under tower with Fleet Footwork. Take every poke trade you can safely. Call for jungle.
Darius.mid_game: Level 11 changes things significantly. You become ranged and he can't stick to you.
Darius.late_game: You outscale him heavily. Your ult makes you unkillable during his all-in.
Darius.win_condition: Survive to level 11. Farm safely with Fleet Footwork. After 11 you win the lane — before 11 you lose it.
Darius.scaling: Darius wins early; Kayle wins past level 11
Darius.positioning: Stay outside his E hook range. Hug minion wave so he can't cleanly get to you without aggroing them.

Garen.trading_pattern: His Q silence stops you from using abilities for the duration. Never fight him melee during silence. Kite with E after level 6.
Garen.ability_to_dodge: Garen Q — sprint away when you see his Q animation. His silence combined with E spin is devastating at low levels.
Garen.early_game: Survive his early dominance. Fleet Footwork to sustain through trades.
Garen.mid_game: You start gaining ranged harass. He can't match your progressive range advantage.
Garen.late_game: You hard outscale. Your ult makes his execute irrelevant during the invulnerability window.
Garen.win_condition: Survive to level 6 and farm. At 11 you dominate him permanently.
Garen.scaling: Garen wins early; Kayle wins past level 11
Garen.positioning: Keep maximum distance. When his Q is on cooldown, trade briefly then retreat.

Fiora.trading_pattern: She can Riposte your E flame wave. She procs Vitals on you constantly. She wins every melee trade. Survive to level 11 and kite her.
Fiora.ability_to_dodge: Fiora W (Riposte) — don't use E when her W is available. Bait it first with a basic attack.
Fiora.early_game: Farm defensively. She will kill you if you fight. Fleet Footwork keeps you healthy.
Fiora.mid_game: Even at level 11 she can chase. Use ult for survival during her engage.
Fiora.late_game: Your DPS at level 16 is enormous. You outscale her in raw damage.
Fiora.win_condition: Survive to 11 with jungle help if needed. Your ult blocks her execute. Farm safely.
Fiora.scaling: Fiora wins early-mid; Kayle wins late game (16+)
Fiora.positioning: Farm under tower early. Use ult when she goes for kills — the invulnerability negates her entire combo.

Aatrox.trading_pattern: His Q sweet spots destroy you melee. Never fight him at levels 1-10. At 11 kite from range.
Aatrox.ability_to_dodge: Aatrox Q — his Q hitboxes are your death sentence early. Stay outside all three Q zones.
Aatrox.early_game: Farm under tower. His healing and Q make trading suicidal.
Aatrox.mid_game: Still dangerous pre-11. Take every safe trade opportunity with ranged poke at level 6.
Aatrox.late_game: You outscale significantly. Your passive burn and Nashor's auto-attacks melt him.
Aatrox.win_condition: Survive to level 11-16. Never fight melee. Use ult for survival when he dives.
Aatrox.scaling: Aatrox wins early-mid; Kayle wins late
Aatrox.positioning: Stand completely outside his Q range early. After 11 use E ranged poke to whittle him down.

Camille.trading_pattern: She can ult you and isolate you pre-11. Her ult in hex zone removes your kite ability. Use your ult during her hex zone to survive.
Camille.ability_to_dodge: Camille E (Hookshot) — stay away from walls. She can't angle E without wall geometry.
Camille.early_game: Farm defensively. She outdamages you completely.
Camille.mid_game: At level 11 you start kiting. Her ult isolates you — use your ult to survive.
Camille.late_game: You outscale her in sustained DPS.
Camille.win_condition: Survive early. After level 11 your ranged auto-attacks and kite beat her mobility.
Camille.scaling: Camille wins early-mid; Kayle wins late
Camille.positioning: Stay center of lane away from walls. Use ult inside her hex zone to survive.

Irelia.trading_pattern: Her Q resets through your kit are oppressive. At levels 1-10 she kills you easily. Keep max distance and kite from 11.
Irelia.ability_to_dodge: Irelia E (Flawless Duet) — sidestep the stun blades.
Irelia.early_game: Survive her aggression. She will kill you if you fight.
Irelia.mid_game: At level 11 your range gives you safety. She still closes gap with Q resets.
Irelia.late_game: Your raw DPS surpasses her at full build.
Irelia.win_condition: Survive to 11. Build speed items to kite her Q gap closes.
Irelia.scaling: Irelia wins early-mid; Kayle wins late
Irelia.positioning: Max distance constantly. Use ult when she Q-chains onto you.

Jax.trading_pattern: His E blocks your auto-attacks which is your main DPS. He wins every fight pre-11. At 11 your ranged E flame wave bypasses his E dodge.
Jax.ability_to_dodge: Jax E (Counterstrike) — your ranged E at level 11+ hits through his E dodge zone. Timing matters.

power_spikes.you: Level 11 (ranged flame bypasses his E), Level 16

Jax.early_game: Farm under tower. His E blocks your auto-attacks.
Jax.mid_game: At 11, your ranged E hits through his Counterstrike. Major power reversal.
Jax.late_game: You outscale him at full build significantly.
Jax.win_condition: Survive to level 11 where your E ranged hits through his Counterstrike. Farm safely.
Jax.scaling: Jax wins early; Kayle wins past level 11
Jax.positioning: Farm defensively under tower. After 11 kite him with ranged E at max range.

Jayce.trading_pattern: He out-pokets you from cannon form. His early range is better than yours levels 1-5. Survive and scale.
Jayce.ability_to_dodge: Jayce Q (Shock Blast) — dodge the arc projectile. It's a wide shot but predictable.
Jayce.early_game: He out-ranges you early. Farm defensively.
Jayce.mid_game: At 11 you become fully ranged — similar to him. More even.
Jayce.late_game: Your raw DPS output surpasses his.
Jayce.win_condition: Survive early poke with Fleet Footwork. Build Nashor's and become the stronger scaling carry.
Jayce.scaling: Jayce wins early; Kayle outscales past level 16
Jayce.positioning: Farm under tower. After level 11 match his cannon poke with your own ranged E.

Malphite.trading_pattern: His armor reduces your auto-attack DPS significantly. Your E flame wave (magic damage) still hits effectively. Focus magic damage in trades.
Malphite.ability_to_dodge: Malphite Q (Seismic Shard) — sidestep it. The movement speed slow makes kiting him harder.
Malphite.early_game: He reduces your auto DPS with armor. Focus on E poke (magic damage).
Malphite.mid_game: His armor makes physical damage ineffective. Your magic damage from E and ult works fine.
Malphite.late_game: You outscale him. His ult can catch you — use your ult during his ult if needed.
Malphite.win_condition: Build AP damage (Nashor's + Rabadon's). Your E magic damage bypasses his armor stacking.
Malphite.scaling: Malphite wins early; Kayle wins late with AP build
Malphite.positioning: Stay outside his Q range. After level 11, kite at max E range.

Mordekaiser.trading_pattern: His ult negates your ranged advantage at level 11. Inside the realm you're melee again. Use your ult inside his ult for survival.
Mordekaiser.ability_to_dodge: Mordekaiser R (Realm of Death) — you can't escape. Your ult inside his ult buys time. Fight with E + ult burst.

power_spikes.you: Level 11 (ranged), Level 16 (ult full power), Nashor's Tooth

Mordekaiser.early_game: Very dangerous. His melee trades crush you. Farm under tower.
Mordekaiser.mid_game: His ult negates your level 11 power spike. Very hard.
Mordekaiser.late_game: Your raw DPS at full build surpasses his.
Mordekaiser.win_condition: Survive early. Your ult inside his ult is survival insurance. Win through teamfight DPS.
Mordekaiser.scaling: Mordekaiser wins early-mid; Kayle wins full build late
Mordekaiser.positioning: Max distance early. Inside his ult, use your ult immediately for invulnerability.

Nasus.trading_pattern: You both scale. Harass him off Q stacks with your progressive range advantage. At level 6 poke freely. He Withers you — use ult during Wither to survive his follow-up.
Nasus.ability_to_dodge: Nasus W (Wither) — use your ult during Wither to negate the slow/attack speed reduction during invulnerability window.
Nasus.early_game: Harass his Q stack attempts. You have range advantage even early.
Nasus.mid_game: At 11 you dominate the poke war. Deny stacks aggressively.
Nasus.late_game: 500 stacks Nasus challenges your 1v1. Use ult and kite him.
Nasus.win_condition: Deny Q stacks early. After level 11 you poke him out of every CS attempt. Build Nashor's for magic damage.
Nasus.scaling: Kayle wins from level 6 onward if ahead; Nasus catches up with stacks
Nasus.positioning: After level 6, stand at E range and poke every Q stack attempt.

Olaf.trading_pattern: His ult makes him immune to your slow and kite tools. After level 11, your ranged autos still work on him even during his ult.
Olaf.ability_to_dodge: Olaf Q (Undertow) — dodge the axe. Your ranged kite works around his retrieve walk.
Olaf.mid_game: At 11 you kite better but his ult removes your slow tool.
Olaf.late_game: Your DPS at full build is enormous. Your ult makes you unkillable during his burst.
Olaf.win_condition: Survive early. Use movement speed to kite even when his ult is active — your attacks still work.
Olaf.scaling: Olaf wins early; Kayle wins late
Olaf.positioning: Max distance always. At 11, kite with movement speed runes.

Renekton.trading_pattern: His burst combo kills you at levels 1-5. His E closes the gap before you can react. Survive and scale.
Renekton.ability_to_dodge: Renekton E (Slice and Dice) — when he uses E, back off immediately. Use ult if he E-W combo's you.
Renekton.early_game: Very rough. Survive under tower. His burst outdamages your healing entirely.
Renekton.mid_game: He falls off after level 10-12. At 11 you poke him from range.
Renekton.win_condition: Survive his early power window. Get jungle help. After 11 you dominate.
Renekton.scaling: Renekton wins early; Kayle outscales past level 11
Renekton.positioning: Tower hug early. After 11 kite from maximum range.

Riven.trading_pattern: She can close gap with E and Q. Her shield absorbs your E hit. Survive to 11 then kite — she still has mobility but less gap close at range.
Riven.ability_to_dodge: Riven Q3 — sidestep her Q casts. Move between each Q to make the knockup miss.
Riven.early_game: Farm safely. She kills you if she lands full combo.
Riven.mid_game: At 11 your range is an advantage. She can still dash through you.
Riven.late_game: Your full build DPS surpasses her.
Riven.win_condition: Survive early. Use ult when she commits full combo. After 11 kite aggressively.
Riven.scaling: Riven wins early-mid; Kayle wins late
Riven.positioning: Move sideways during her Q casts. Use ult to nullify her burst window.

Sett.trading_pattern: His W grit true damage ignores your ult invulnerability timing if you ult while it's mid-flight. Dodge W entirely by sidestepping and using ult before W hits.
Sett.ability_to_dodge: Sett W (Haymaker) — sidestep the center explosion. Use ult before the W center hits you.
Sett.early_game: Survive. He kills you at all early levels.
Sett.mid_game: At 11 you gain range advantage. He can still close gap.
Sett.win_condition: Survive to 11 with jungle help. Use ult to block his all-in. After 11 poke freely.
Sett.positioning: Sidestep his W center. Never stand in front of him melee range.

Shen.trading_pattern: His W blocks your auto-attacks. Your E magic wave still hits through his W zone. Focus E poke in trades.
Shen.ability_to_dodge: Shen W (Spirit's Refuge) — use E (magic damage) during his W, not autos.
Shen.early_game: He out-trades you. Your E magic hits through his W.
Shen.mid_game: His ult roams are impactful. Push and create counter-pressure.
Shen.late_game: You outscale. Your DPS is enormous.
Shen.win_condition: Survive early. Use E poke (magic) through his W. After 11 dominate him from range.
Shen.scaling: Shen wins early; Kayle wins past level 11
Shen.positioning: After 11, stand at E max range and poke. Never melee fight.

Sion.trading_pattern: Dodge his Q charge easily with movement. He's slow and can't stick to you. After level 6 you poke him freely.
Sion.ability_to_dodge: Sion Q (Decimating Smash) — move perpendicular to his charge direction. Very easy to dodge at range.
Sion.early_game: He zones you with Q threat. Farm carefully.
Sion.mid_game: At level 11 you poke him out of every trade.
Sion.late_game: Your DPS melts him. His HP becomes your execute target.
Sion.win_condition: Survive early, dominate after 11. Your execute ult at 16 is devastating on high-HP targets like him.
Sion.scaling: Sion wins early; Kayle wins past level 11
Sion.positioning: Dodge his Q charge with lateral movement. After 11, stand at E flame range.

Trundle.trading_pattern: He wins early trades. His ult steals your AD/AP scaling stats which is brutal for your late game 1v1. Group fight instead of 1v1 him.
Trundle.ability_to_dodge: Trundle E (Pillar of Ice) — sidestep it. Don't let it cut off your kite path.
Trundle.mid_game: His ult on you steals your AP stacks. Very painful for your 1v1 scaling.
Trundle.late_game: Avoid 1v1 with his ult. Group fight where his ult can't be wasted on you solo.
Trundle.win_condition: After 11, poke from range. Avoid his ult 1v1 scenario by grouping for fights.
Trundle.scaling: Even post-11; Trundle's ult limits Kayle's 1v1 scaling effectiveness
Trundle.positioning: Kite around his Pillar. Stay at max E range after level 11.

Tryndamere.trading_pattern: His crits destroy you early. Use ult at the last second when he spins on you. At level 11 your ranged form lets you kite his spin.
Tryndamere.ability_to_dodge: Tryndamere E (Spinning Slash) — at level 11+, kite backwards when he spins toward you.
Tryndamere.early_game: He kills you. Farm under tower.
Tryndamere.mid_game: At 11 your ranged form lets you kite his engage.
Tryndamere.late_game: Your DPS melts him. Wait out his ult then finish.
Tryndamere.win_condition: Survive early. After 11, kite his Spinning Slash approach. Use ult at the right moment — never during his ult.
Tryndamere.scaling: Tryndamere wins early; Kayle wins past level 11
Tryndamere.positioning: After 11, maintain max E range. Kite backwards when he spins.

Urgot.trading_pattern: He out-ranges you pre-11 with his shotgun knees. After 11 you have similar range to his W zone. Still loses direct trades.
Urgot.ability_to_dodge: Urgot W (Purge) — stay outside his W activation range. Kite backwards continuously.
Urgot.mid_game: At 11 you match his range. Hard to win 1v1 due to his passive.
Urgot.late_game: Your DPS at full build outpaces his.
Urgot.win_condition: Survive early. At 11 and beyond, outpoke him. Your ult prevents his execute.
Urgot.scaling: Urgot wins early-mid; Kayle outscales late
Urgot.positioning: Stay outside his W knee activation range. Kite continuously.

Vayne.trading_pattern: Both scale as carries. Her Silver Bolts true damage counters your ult invulnerability timing. You out-range her at level 11. Never stand near walls.
Vayne.ability_to_dodge: Vayne E (Condemn) — never stand near walls. Your ult doesn't block wall stuns.
Vayne.early_game: She pokes you early. Farm defensively.
Vayne.mid_game: Both becoming carries. You have more range at level 11.
Vayne.late_game: Very close matchup. Your ult prevents one kill attempt. Her true damage is constant.
Vayne.win_condition: Stay away from walls. Use ult to deny her kill attempt. Your ranged form at 11 helps kite her.
Vayne.scaling: Vayne wins early; Kayle slightly better at full build due to range
Vayne.positioning: Never near walls. After 11, maintain max E range to outpoke her.

Varus.trading_pattern: He out-ranges you pre-11. His W blight stacks hurt even at range. Survive and scale — at 11 you match his range.
Varus.ability_to_dodge: Varus Q (Piercing Arrow) — dodge the slow charged projectile laterally.

power_spikes.you: Level 11 (ranged equal to his), Nashor's Tooth

Varus.early_game: He out-ranges and out-damages you early. Farm safely.
Varus.mid_game: At 11 you match his range. Still his blight damage is consistent.
Varus.late_game: Your burst output surpasses his sustained damage.
Varus.win_condition: Survive early. After 11 match his range and out-trade. Nashor's provides consistent magic DPS.
Varus.scaling: Varus wins early; even at level 11; Kayle wins full build
Varus.positioning: Dodge his Q laterally. After 11, stand at max E range and trade magic damage.

Yasuo.trading_pattern: His Wind Wall blocks your E flame wave. He blocks your main harass tool. At level 11 your flame E is blockable. Poke with autos outside his Wind Wall.
Yasuo.ability_to_dodge: Yasuo W (Wind Wall) — don't throw E into it. Throw E from angles where his Wind Wall coverage is minimal.
Yasuo.early_game: He kills you at melee range. Farm under tower.
Yasuo.mid_game: His crits and Wind Wall block your poke. Very frustrating matchup.
Yasuo.late_game: Your ult negates his ult air combo. Use ult when he ults you.
Yasuo.win_condition: Use ult to negate his ult air combo. Throw E from sideways angles to bypass Wind Wall. Survive early.
Yasuo.scaling: Yasuo wins early-mid; Kayle wins full build late
Yasuo.positioning: After 11, approach from angles where his Wind Wall coverage is limited.

Yone.trading_pattern: His E dash closes gap before your ranged form helps. His ult hits you even at range. Use your ult when he ults you to negate it.
Yone.ability_to_dodge: Yone R (Fate Sealed) — use your ult when his ult starts. It's an invulnerability window through his ult.
Yone.early_game: He kills you. Farm under tower.
Yone.mid_game: At 11 you have range but he can E-dash through it.
Yone.late_game: Your ult negates his. DPS fight at full build favors you.
Yone.win_condition: Use ult to negate his ult. After 11 maintain max range. His E commitments leave him vulnerable.
Yone.scaling: Yone wins early-mid; Kayle wins late
Yone.positioning: After 11, max E range. When he E-dashes, use ult if his damage threatens you.

Yorick.trading_pattern: Dodge his E to deny Maiden empowerment. Your range advantage early makes dodging his E easier than most champions.
Yorick.ability_to_dodge: Yorick E (Mourning Mist) — sidestep it. Your movement advantage makes this easier than most.
Yorick.early_game: He wins early. Your range helps dodge his E.
Yorick.mid_game: Maiden + Hullbreaker makes him dangerous in split push. At 11 you poke him out.
Yorick.late_game: You outscale him enormously.
Yorick.win_condition: Dodge his E consistently. At level 11 poke him out of every CS attempt. Win before he fully stacks Hullbreaker.
Yorick.scaling: Yorick wins early; Kayle wins past level 11
Yorick.positioning: Move laterally to dodge E. After 11, kite at max E range.

Naafiri.trading_pattern: Naafiri has early burst and mobility. Respect her all-in threat and farm safely.
Naafiri.ability_to_dodge: Naafiri Q (Darkin Salvo) — step to the side or back away.
Naafiri.early_game: Play defensively. Naafiri has strong early all-in potential.
Naafiri.mid_game: Use ult for picks on isolated targets. Space in fights.
Naafiri.late_game: Both scale. Teamfight positioning matters most.
Naafiri.win_condition: Survive early, make picks with ult. Win through teamfight coordination.
Naafiri.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Naafiri.positioning: Keep distance with E poke. Never walk into her all-in range.

Aurelion Sol.trading_pattern: Aurelion Sol has superior waveclear and roam threat. Farm safely and respect his scaling.
Aurelion Sol.ability_to_dodge: Aurelion Sol W (Celestial Expansion) — stay at range or back off.
Aurelion Sol.early_game: Farm defensively. Aurelion Sol pushes faster and roams better.
Aurelion Sol.mid_game: Use ult for picks. Aurelion Sol controls mid lane better.
Aurelion Sol.late_game: He outscales in teamfights. Win through picks and objective control.
Aurelion Sol.win_condition: Make picks with ult before he roams. Win through macro pressure.
Aurelion Sol.scaling: Aurelion Sol outscales — his teamfight control and roam impact is superior
Aurelion Sol.positioning: Keep distance with E poke. Use ult for picks on roamers.

Vel'Koz.trading_pattern: Vel'Koz outranges you. Space carefully and farm defensively.
Vel'Koz.ability_to_dodge: Vel'Koz E (Tractor Beam) — dodge by stepping away or to the side.
Vel'Koz.early_game: Farm defensively. His range advantage is overwhelming.
Vel'Koz.mid_game: Both scale into poke wars. Space properly.
Vel'Koz.late_game: He outscales in sustained damage. Use ult for picks.
Vel'Koz.win_condition: Make picks with ult. Win through teamfight coordination.
Vel'Koz.scaling: Vel'Koz outscales — his sustained poke is overwhelming
Vel'Koz.positioning: Keep maximum distance. Use minions for cover.

Mel.trading_pattern: Mel reflects projectile damage. Use E carefully and respect her reflect defense.
Mel.ability_to_dodge: Mel E (Reflect) — your E reflects back, so be strategic with casts.
Mel.early_game: Farm defensively. Mel's reflect punishes your poke.
Mel.mid_game: Use ult selectively to avoid wasting damage. Space properly.
Mel.late_game: She outscales with her reflect defense. Make picks before teamfights.
Mel.win_condition: Make picks with ult before teamfights. Win through macro pressure.
Mel.scaling: Mel slightly favored — her reflect becomes more valuable late
Mel.positioning: Use E cautiously to avoid reflect penalty. Keep distance.

Fizz.trading_pattern: Fizz is melee with burst. Keep maximum distance and farm safely.
Fizz.ability_to_dodge: Fizz R (Chum the Waters) — move perpendicular or away from shark.
Fizz.early_game: Play very defensively. Fizz has strong all-in potential.
Fizz.mid_game: Use ult to protect yourself from his engages. Space in fights.
Fizz.late_game: Both scale. Teamfight positioning determines winner.
Fizz.win_condition: Survive early, make picks with ult. Win through teamfight coordination.
Fizz.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Fizz.positioning: Keep maximum distance. Use ult defensively against his engage.

Wukong.trading_pattern: Wukong has early mobility and tankiness. Keep distance and farm safely.
Wukong.ability_to_dodge: Wukong E (Nimble Strike) — step back when he dashes toward you.
Wukong.early_game: Play defensively. Wukong has strong early skirmish potential.
Wukong.mid_game: Use ult to protect from his engage. Space properly.
Wukong.late_game: Both scale. Teamfight positioning matters most.
Wukong.win_condition: Survive early, make picks with ult. Win through teamfight coordination.
Wukong.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Wukong.positioning: Keep distance with E poke. Use ult defensively.

Vladimir.trading_pattern: Vladimir is weak early but sustains well. Respect his scaling and farm safely.
Vladimir.ability_to_dodge: Vladimir Q (Transfusion) — stay out of his short range.
Vladimir.early_game: You have early advantage with poke. Don't let him get fed.
Vladimir.mid_game: Both scale into teamfights. Make picks when possible.
Vladimir.late_game: He outscales in sustained teamfights. Use ult for picks.
Vladimir.win_condition: Get an early advantage, make picks with ult. Finish before he scales.
Vladimir.scaling: Vladimir outscales — his teamfight sustain is overwhelming
Vladimir.positioning: Use E to poke. Keep distance from his Q range.

Nasus.trading_pattern: Nasus stacks damage. Abuse him early with E poke before he scales.
Nasus.ability_to_dodge: Nasus W (Wither) — dodge by moving away or stepping back.
Nasus.early_game: Abuse him with constant E poke. Prevent his scaling.
Nasus.mid_game: Continue poking. Make picks before he becomes unkillable.
Nasus.late_game: He outscales significantly. Finish before his stacks make him unkillable.
Nasus.win_condition: Get an early lead through poke. Finish before Nasus scales.
Nasus.scaling: Nasus significantly outscales — you need a major early lead
Nasus.positioning: Use E to constantly poke from range. Never walk into his all-in.

Smolder.trading_pattern: Smolder is weak early. Use E to farm and poke freely.
Smolder.ability_to_dodge: Smolder Q (Breath) — dodge by stepping back.
Smolder.early_game: Completely dominate with E poke. Farm freely.
Smolder.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let him scale.
Smolder.late_game: He outscales significantly. Finish before he gets 2-3 items.
Smolder.win_condition: Get an early lead and snowball. Finish before Smolder scales.
Smolder.scaling: Smolder significantly outscales — you need a major lead
Smolder.positioning: Use E to constantly poke. Push him off farm.

Azir.trading_pattern: Azir is weak early. Use E to farm and poke freely.
Azir.ability_to_dodge: Azir soldiers have limited early range; spam E into them.
Azir.early_game: Dominate early with E poke. Azir struggles early.
Azir.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let him free-farm.
Azir.late_game: He outscales in teamfights. Finish before his control becomes oppressive.
Azir.win_condition: Get an early lead and snowball. Finish before Azir scales.
Azir.scaling: Azir outscales — his teamfight control improves late
Azir.positioning: Use E to constantly poke. Maintain mid lane control.

Yone.trading_pattern: Yone is weak early to ranged poke. Use E to spam him out.
Yone.ability_to_dodge: Yone E (Soul Unbound) — abuse the cooldown when he returns.
Yone.early_game: Dominate with E poke. Yone is weak to ranged harassment.
Yone.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Make picks with ult.
Yone.late_game: He outscales with itemization. Finish before he gets tanky.
Yone.win_condition: Get an early lead through poke. Finish before Yone scales.
Yone.scaling: Yone outscales — his itemization and scaling are superior
Yone.positioning: Use E to constantly poke from range. Maintain distance.

Galio.trading_pattern: Galio is melee. Use E to farm and poke from range freely.
Galio.ability_to_dodge: Galio W (Shield) — respect his tankiness but spam E.
Galio.early_game: Dominate with E poke. Galio is weak to ranged harassment.
Galio.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Use ult for picks.
Galio.late_game: He becomes tanky. Finish before his tankiness becomes oppressive.
Galio.win_condition: Get an early lead through poke. Finish before Galio scales.
Galio.scaling: Galio outscales — his tankiness increases late
Galio.positioning: Use E to constantly poke from range. Maintain distance.

Taliyah.trading_pattern: Taliyah has strong waveclear. Farm when her abilities are down.
Taliyah.ability_to_dodge: Taliyah Q (Threaded Volley) — dodge by moving perpendicular.
Taliyah.mid_game: Both have roam potential. Make picks with ult.
Taliyah.late_game: Both scale. Teamfight positioning determines winner.
Taliyah.win_condition: Make picks with ult. Win through objective control.
Taliyah.scaling: Taliyah slightly favored — her roaming is stronger
Taliyah.positioning: Farm safely. Use E poke when safe.

Cassiopeia.trading_pattern: Cassiopeia has poke and poison. Trade when her abilities are down.
Cassiopeia.ability_to_dodge: Cassiopeia W (Miasma) — walk around it or wait for dissipation.
Cassiopeia.early_game: Cassio has early poke advantage. Farm defensively.
Cassiopeia.mid_game: Both scale into poke wars. Make picks with ult.
Cassiopeia.late_game: She outscales in sustained teamfights. Use ult for picks.
Cassiopeia.win_condition: Make picks with ult. Win through objective control.
Cassiopeia.scaling: Cassiopeia outscales — her sustained damage is overwhelming
Cassiopeia.positioning: Keep distance and use E poke. Avoid her poison zones.

Ryze.trading_pattern: Ryze has early poke. Trade when his abilities are down.
Ryze.ability_to_dodge: Ryze Q (Overload) — dodge by stepping back or to the side.
Ryze.early_game: Ryze has early poke. Farm defensively.
Ryze.mid_game: Both scale. Make picks with ult.
Ryze.late_game: He outscales in sustained teamfights. Use ult for picks.
Ryze.win_condition: Make picks with ult. Finish before he scales.
Ryze.scaling: Ryze outscales — his teamfight control improves late
Ryze.positioning: Keep distance with E poke. Use ult for picks.

Seraphine.trading_pattern: Seraphine has similar poke and utility. Trade when her abilities are down.
Seraphine.ability_to_dodge: Seraphine E (Surround Sound) — dodge by stepping away from zone.
Seraphine.early_game: Mirror her playstyle. Both have similar early game.
Seraphine.mid_game: Both scale. Make picks with ult.
Seraphine.late_game: Both scale similarly. Teamfight positioning determines winner.
Seraphine.win_condition: Make picks with ult. Win through teamfight coordination.
Seraphine.scaling: Seraphine slightly favored — her teamfight utility is marginally better
Seraphine.positioning: Use E poke to maintain distance. Avoid her poke zones.

Orianna.trading_pattern: Orianna has similar poke and teamfight. Trade when her ball is far.
Orianna.ability_to_dodge: Orianna Q (Command: Attack) — dodge by stepping back.
Orianna.early_game: Mirror her playstyle. Both have similar early game.
Orianna.mid_game: Both scale. Make picks with ult.
Orianna.late_game: She outscales slightly in teamfights. Use ult for picks.
Orianna.win_condition: Make picks with ult. Win through objective control.
Orianna.scaling: Orianna slightly favored — her teamfight control is superior
Orianna.positioning: Use E poke to maintain distance. Keep distance from her ball.

Zed.trading_pattern: Zed has mobility and burst damage. Keep distance and poke with E.
Zed.ability_to_dodge: Zed W (Living Shadow) — back off when he clones to close range.
Zed.early_game: Play defensively. Zed has strong early all-in.
Zed.mid_game: Use ult for picks and poke with E. Space from his shadows.
Zed.late_game: Both scale. Teamfight positioning determines winner.
Zed.win_condition: Make picks with ult before he gets leads. Farm safely early.
Zed.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Zed.positioning: Keep maximum distance. Never walk into his shadow range.

Diana.trading_pattern: Diana is melee with all-in potential. Keep distance and farm safely.
Diana.ability_to_dodge: Diana Q (Crescent Strike) — dodge by stepping to the side.
Diana.early_game: Play defensively. Diana has strong all-in potential.
Diana.mid_game: Use ult for picks on isolated targets. Space in teamfights.
Diana.late_game: Both scale. Teamfight positioning matters most.
Diana.win_condition: Survive early, make picks with ult. Win through teamfight coordination.
Diana.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Diana.positioning: Keep distance with E poke. Use ult defensively.

Syndra.trading_pattern: Syndra has poke and CC. Trade when her abilities are down.
Syndra.ability_to_dodge: Syndra E (Scatter the Weak) — dodge by moving away.
Syndra.early_game: Play defensively. Syndra has strong early poke.
Syndra.mid_game: Both scale into poke wars. Make picks with ult.
Syndra.late_game: She outscales slightly in burst potential. Use ult for picks.
Syndra.win_condition: Make picks with ult. Win through objective control.
Syndra.scaling: Syndra slightly favored — her spike potential is higher
Syndra.positioning: Keep distance with E poke. Avoid her orb zones.

LeBlanc.trading_pattern: LeBlanc has burst and mobility. Keep distance and farm safely.
LeBlanc.ability_to_dodge: LeBlanc E (Ethereal Chains) — dodge by moving away or to the side.
LeBlanc.early_game: Play very defensively. LeBlanc has superior burst.
LeBlanc.mid_game: Use ult to protect from her engage. Space in teamfights.
LeBlanc.late_game: Both scale. Teamfight positioning determines winner.
LeBlanc.win_condition: Survive early, make picks with ult. Win through teamfight coordination.
LeBlanc.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
LeBlanc.positioning: Keep maximum distance. Never walk into her combo range.

Darius.trading_pattern: His bleed prevents your passive shield from recharging. Short Q trades to slow him and back off. Never stay in melee range during bleed ticks.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: Darius Q — stay outside the outer ring. Back off immediately when he chases with W to prevent bleed stacks.
Darius.early_game: Survive his early dominance. Your passive shield can't recharge under bleed. Farm and trade briefly with Q.
Darius.mid_game: You become tankier with items. His bleed matters less once you have Sunfire.
Darius.late_game: Your ult engage is more impactful in teamfights than his single-target pressure.
Darius.win_condition: Survive early bleeding. Build Plated Steelcaps to reduce bleed physical damage. Win through teamfight engage.
Darius.scaling: Darius wins early lane; Malphite better teamfight enabler
Darius.positioning: Short trades with Q to slow, then back off before bleed stacks. Don't let bleed prevent shield regen.

Garen.trading_pattern: His Q silence stops you from using Q to slow him. His E spins through your armor. He wins most trades pre-items. Farm and look for ult.
Garen.ability_to_dodge: Garen Q — when you see him sprint, Q him before he reaches you to slow him, then back off.
Garen.early_game: He out-trades you. Your passive shield helps but his Q stops your trading. Farm safely.
Garen.mid_game: You become tankier. His execute ult threatens you at low HP.
Garen.late_game: Your ult is a better teamfight tool. Group and engage.
Garen.win_condition: Farm and scale. Your ult is more valuable to the team than his. Win through macro.
Garen.scaling: Garen wins lane; Malphite better teamfight
Garen.positioning: Q him when he sprints to slow his approach. Trade briefly then back off.

Fiora.trading_pattern: She procs Vitals constantly and heals off them. Your armor reduces her physical damage somewhat but she has true damage. Never fight extended.
Fiora.ability_to_dodge: Fiora W (Riposte) — she Ripostes your ult. This is a massive problem in teamfights. Bait W before ult if possible.
Fiora.early_game: She trades through your armor with Vitals true damage. Farm defensively.
Fiora.mid_game: She wins all duels. Your value is in ult roaming.
Fiora.late_game: She can Riposte your ult — try to bait her W before ulting in teamfights.
Fiora.win_condition: Don't 1v1 her. Your value is as a teamfight initiator. Bait W before committing ult.
Fiora.scaling: Fiora wins lane; Malphite better teamfight
Fiora.positioning: Farm under tower. Your ult value comes from teamfights not lane.

Aatrox.trading_pattern: Your armor makes his physical Q damage weaker than against other champions. Q him to slow his advance and disengage. He can't stick to you easily.
Aatrox.ability_to_dodge: Aatrox Q — stand between his Q hitboxes. Your bulk means you can take some hits without losing much.
Aatrox.early_game: Armor vs his physical damage makes trades okay. Q to slow him, disengage.
Aatrox.mid_game: His healing becomes a problem. Bramble Vest helps.
Aatrox.late_game: Your ult engage is more valuable than his kit. Group and roam.
Aatrox.win_condition: Farm and build Bramble Vest. Your ult into a teamfight is more impactful than his lane pressure.
Aatrox.scaling: Even; Malphite better teamfight, Aatrox better split push
Aatrox.positioning: Stand between his Q zones. Q to slow and disengage.

Camille.trading_pattern: Her true damage in E bypasses your armor entirely. She wins all trades. Farm and look for ult opportunities on other lanes.
Camille.ability_to_dodge: Camille E (Hookshot) — stay away from walls. Her E requires wall geometry.
Camille.early_game: She wins with true damage. Farm defensively.
Camille.mid_game: Shove and roam with ult. Don't fight 1v1.
Camille.late_game: Your ult engage is your value. Group and win through it.
Camille.win_condition: Survive and roam with ult. Never fight 1v1.
Camille.scaling: Camille outscales in duels; Malphite better teamfight initiator
Camille.positioning: Center of lane away from walls. Farm and look for ult windows on other lanes.

Irelia.trading_pattern: Her Q resets avoid your passive shield replenishment easily. Your W reduces her attack speed which slows her stacks somewhat.
Irelia.ability_to_dodge: Irelia E (Flawless Duet) — sidestep the stun blades.
Irelia.early_game: She bullies you. Your W reduces her attack speed.
Irelia.mid_game: Her Trinity and maxed stacks outpace your armor stacking.
Irelia.late_game: Your ult is far more valuable. Group and engage.
Irelia.win_condition: Use W to reduce her attack speed (slows passive stacks). Roam with ult.
Irelia.scaling: Irelia wins lane; Malphite better teamfight
Irelia.positioning: Activate W when she Q chains onto you. Sidestep E blades.

Jax.trading_pattern: His E dodges your auto-attacks. Your Q slow is your best tool. He wins extended fights significantly with mixed damage.
Jax.ability_to_dodge: Jax E (Counterstrike) — don't autoattack while spinning. Your Q poke still works through his E.
Jax.early_game: He beats you. Use Q to poke and disengage.
Jax.mid_game: He wins all 1v1s. Shove and roam with ult.
Jax.late_game: Your ult engage is better than his kit in teamfights.
Jax.win_condition: Q to slow and disengage. Roam with ult. Win through teamfight engage.
Jax.scaling: Jax wins lane; Malphite better teamfight
Jax.positioning: Q him to slow, then back off. Don't auto during his E.

Jayce.trading_pattern: He pokes you from cannon range. Your passive shield absorbs some. Use Q to slow him when he walks up to melee CS.
Jayce.ability_to_dodge: Jayce Q (Shock Blast) — sidestep the cannon arc shot.
Jayce.early_game: He pokes your shield down. Q him during melee CS attempts.
Jayce.mid_game: Your armor reduces his physical poke. He'll roam — push and teleport.
Jayce.late_game: Your ult is more valuable in teamfights than his poke.
Jayce.win_condition: Passive shield tanks some poke. Build armor items. Win through ult teamfight engage.
Jayce.scaling: Jayce wins early; Malphite better teamfight
Jayce.positioning: Q him when he's in melee form. Sidestep cannon Q arcs.

Kayle.trading_pattern: Abuse her early before level 6. Your armor makes her pre-11 physical damage weak. Q her whenever she walks up.
Kayle.ability_to_dodge: Kayle E (Starfire Spellblade) — sidestep her ranged empowered auto at later levels.
Kayle.early_game: You bully her. She's weak melee against your armor.
Kayle.mid_game: At 11 she becomes ranged. Your armor matters less against her magic E.
Kayle.late_game: Both are teamfight tools. Your ult engage vs her sustained DPS.
Kayle.win_condition: Build early CS lead. At level 11 she threatens — group for ult engage value.
Kayle.scaling: Malphite wins early; even late
Kayle.positioning: Stay on top of her early. After level 11 maintain distance or group.

Mordekaiser.trading_pattern: His ult removes your passive shield and ult — both of your main tools are inaccessible in his realm. He wins 1v1 inside the realm.
Mordekaiser.ability_to_dodge: Mordekaiser R (Realm of Death) — you can't escape it. Fight back with Q slow and auto-attacks inside the realm.
Mordekaiser.early_game: He wins early. Short trades with Q.
Mordekaiser.mid_game: His ult negates your ult in 1v1. Very hard lane.
Mordekaiser.late_game: In teamfights without his ult available, your ult engage is stronger.
Mordekaiser.win_condition: Survive and play for teamfight ult engage. Track his ult CD — fight when it's down.
Mordekaiser.scaling: Mordekaiser wins lane; Malphite better multi-target teamfight
Mordekaiser.positioning: Don't fight inside his W passive ring. Use Q to slow him and disengage.

Nasus.trading_pattern: Q him every time he goes for Q stacks. He can't respond. Your passive shield recharges freely since he has no bleed. Bully him off every CS.
Nasus.ability_to_dodge: Nasus W (Wither) — Q him back before he can Wither you, or just disengage immediately.
Nasus.early_game: Free bully lane. Deny every Q stack with Q poke.
Nasus.mid_game: His stacks accumulate. Build and roam with ult.
Nasus.late_game: 500 stacks — Wither makes your Q slow less impactful. Group fight.
Nasus.win_condition: Deny stacks. Build early lead. Your ult teamfight engage wins games.
Nasus.scaling: Malphite wins early; Nasus threatens past 400 stacks
Nasus.positioning: Step between him and his Q CS target. Q poke every stack attempt.

Olaf.trading_pattern: He wins the physical trade war. Your armor helps but his Q axes hurt at range. His ult makes your CC useless in extended fights.
Olaf.ability_to_dodge: Olaf Q (Undertow) — sidestep the axe. Your passive makes you tanky but he deals consistent damage.
Olaf.early_game: He out-trades you. Farm and survive.
Olaf.mid_game: His ult denies your Q slow and W attack speed reduction. Hard matchup.
Olaf.late_game: Your ult engage in teamfights is still strong. Your ult doesn't CC him during Ragnarok but it targets others.
Olaf.win_condition: Farm and roam with ult. Don't fight him 1v1 when his ult is available. Engage on other targets in teamfights.
Olaf.scaling: Olaf outscales in 1v1; Malphite better multi-target teamfight
Olaf.positioning: Dodge his axe. Q to slow when he's out of ult. Disengage when ult activates.

Renekton.trading_pattern: He burst-combos you before your passive shield can help. Short trades with Q after dodging his W. His burst is front-loaded.
Renekton.ability_to_dodge: Renekton W (Ruthless Predator) — the stun is the critical part. Don't trade into his E dash unless your shield is full.
Renekton.early_game: He wins early. Passive shield helps absorb some burst but his combo chunks through it.
Renekton.mid_game: He falls off mid-game. Your armor scaling becomes more relevant.
Renekton.late_game: Your ult is stronger in teamfights. Group.
Renekton.win_condition: Survive early, scale. Your teamfight ult is worth much more than his lane bully kit.
Renekton.scaling: Renekton wins early; Malphite better teamfight
Renekton.positioning: Let passive shield recharge between trades. Q him after he uses E-W combo.

Riven.trading_pattern: Her burst combo kills you quickly. Your armor helps but she has too much sustained damage in her combo. Q to slow her and disengage.
Riven.ability_to_dodge: Riven E (Valor) — she uses shield before engaging. Q after her E to slow her retreat.
Riven.early_game: She out-trades you. Q slow and disengage.
Riven.mid_game: Her full combo destroys you even with armor. Shove and roam with ult.
Riven.late_game: Your ult is more impactful. Group.
Riven.win_condition: Survive and roam with ult. Don't 1v1 her.
Riven.scaling: Riven wins lane; Malphite better teamfight
Riven.positioning: Q her to slow when she engages. Back off and let passive shield recharge.

Sett.trading_pattern: His grit accumulates from taking damage — you can't trade freely without feeding his W. Short Q trades and disengage before he builds grit.
Sett.ability_to_dodge: Sett W (Haymaker) — sidestep the true damage center when he throws it.
Sett.early_game: Even. Short Q trades. Don't let him auto-attack you too freely.
Sett.mid_game: You become tankier with items. His grit W hurts through armor.
Sett.late_game: Both are teamfight initiators. Your ult engage vs his ult grab.
Sett.win_condition: Farm and scale. Your ult is generally more impactful in 5v5 engages. Trade Q for Q.
Sett.scaling: Even; Malphite better multi-target engage late
Sett.positioning: Sidestep his W center. Q him when he walks up for CS.

Shen.trading_pattern: His W blocks your autos but not your Q. Q poke to slow him. His energy-based kit means he doesn't run out of resources like mana.
Shen.ability_to_dodge: Shen W (Spirit's Refuge) — stop autoattacking when active. Use Q poke instead since it's not a basic attack.
Shen.early_game: Even trading. Q poke is your main tool. His W blocks autos.
Shen.mid_game: Both want to roam with ults. Track his ult and counter-rotate.
Shen.late_game: Both are great teamfight initiators. Coordinate with your team.
Shen.win_condition: Trade Q poke. Push and force him to choose between ulting elsewhere and losing CS.
Shen.positioning: Q poke when he walks up. Stop autos when W activates.

Sion.trading_pattern: Interrupt his Q charge with your Q slow. He's immobile and can't stop your passive shield regeneration. Trade freely.
Sion.ability_to_dodge: Sion Q (Decimating Smash) — Q him as he charges to slow and close gap. Move perpendicular to avoid knockup.
Sion.early_game: You bully him. Q slow into trades freely.
Sion.mid_game: His HP stacks make him tankier. Your armor reduces his damage.
Sion.late_game: Both are teamfight frontliners. Your ult is faster and more reliable as an engage.
Sion.win_condition: Bully him and deny HP stacks. Roam with ult to win the map.
Sion.scaling: Malphite wins early; even late
Sion.positioning: Q him when he charges to slow and close gap simultaneously.

Trundle.trading_pattern: His ult steals your armor and MR — losing resistances while he gains them is devastating for a tank. Avoid 1v1 with his ult available.
Trundle.ability_to_dodge: Trundle E (Pillar of Ice) — sidestep it. Don't let it cut off your escape path.
Trundle.early_game: You win early. Bully him and deny CS.
Trundle.mid_game: His ult stealing your resistances is a massive problem. Avoid 1v1.
Trundle.late_game: In teamfights, don't be the target of his ult. Group and engage on others.
Trundle.win_condition: Build large early lead. In teamfights, engage before he can target you with his ult. Force him to waste it on someone else.
Trundle.scaling: Malphite wins early; Trundle's ult limits mid-late 1v1
Trundle.positioning: Engage with ult on other targets in teamfights to avoid being his ult target.

Tryndamere.trading_pattern: Q him when he approaches — the slow makes his Spinning Slash follow-up weaker. Your armor reduces his physical crit damage significantly.
Tryndamere.ability_to_dodge: Tryndamere E (Spinning Slash) — Q before he uses E to slow him, making the gap close less effective.
Tryndamere.early_game: You win early. Q to slow his approach. Your armor halves his crit damage.
Tryndamere.mid_game: His crits become more threatening but your armor reduces them.
Tryndamere.late_game: His ult prevents kills for 5 seconds. Wait it out. Your ult on multiple targets is better.
Tryndamere.win_condition: Build early lead. Q slow reduces his crit effectiveness. Never commit to kill during his ult.
Tryndamere.positioning: Q him before he uses E so he arrives slow. Randuin's Omen active reduces his crit damage.

Urgot.trading_pattern: His shotgun knees shred even with armor. His W passive pops through your passive shield. Very hard to trade favorably.
Urgot.ability_to_dodge: Urgot W (Purge) — angle to reduce knee procs. Don't stand directly in front of his active knees.
Urgot.early_game: He beats you. Farm and survive.
Urgot.mid_game: He dominates. Shove and roam with ult.
Urgot.late_game: Your ult engage in teamfights is more valuable.
Urgot.win_condition: Roam with ult. Don't fight him 1v1. Win through team engage.
Urgot.scaling: Urgot outscales in 1v1; Malphite better multi-target teamfight
Urgot.positioning: Angle away from his knee direction. Q to slow and disengage when he gets close.

Vayne.trading_pattern: Kill her before Guinsoo's. Your armor is useless against her Silver Bolts true damage. She hard counters your tank build.
Vayne.ability_to_dodge: Vayne E (Condemn) — never stand near walls. Her stun is devastating.
Vayne.early_game: You win early — bully her. Force kills before items.
Vayne.mid_game: Her Silver Bolts ignore your entire armor stack. Avoid 1v1.
Vayne.late_game: She counters tank building fundamentally. Engage with ult but don't fight her alone.
Vayne.win_condition: Kill her early and get a lead. After Guinsoo's you fundamentally lose 1v1.
Vayne.scaling: Malphite wins very early; Vayne hard outscales vs tanks
Vayne.positioning: Never stand near walls. Bully early before her items arrive.

Varus.trading_pattern: He pokes from extreme range. Your passive shield absorbs some Q shots but his consistent W blight poke drains you. Q him when he's within range.
Varus.ability_to_dodge: Varus Q (Piercing Arrow) — sidestep the slow projectile. Move laterally.
Varus.early_game: He pokes you down from range. Q him when he approaches.
Varus.mid_game: His W true damage ignores armor. Very difficult matchup.
Varus.late_game: Your ult engage is still valuable. Group and engage on carries.
Varus.win_condition: Roam with ult and create team leads. You can't win side lane — use your ult value.
Varus.scaling: Varus outscales; Malphite better teamfight initiator
Varus.positioning: Sidestep his Q. Q him when he walks up for CS.

Yasuo.trading_pattern: He blocks your Q with Wind Wall. Your Q is your primary tool — losing it to Wind Wall hurts. Use Q from angles where Wind Wall can't cover.

Yasuo.positioning: Approach from the side so his Wind Wall placement is less effective against your Q.
